nodes.summary: Yellow-legged flyrobin（Kempiella griseoceps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-legged flyrobin。

nodes.name: Yellow-legged flyrobin
nodes.summary: The yellow-legged flyrobin or yellow-legged flycatcher (Kempiella griseoceps) is a species of passerine bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae. It is found in New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. The yellow-legged flyrobin was formerly placed in the genus Microeca. It was moved to the resurrected genus Kempiella that had originally been introduced by the Australian ornithologist Gregory Mathews based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2011. References
